errors.description: The evidence record chain is missing, malformed, or not bound to the export profile.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny regulator export planning until evidence chain continuity is verified

errors.description: The sealed audit archive is missing, malformed, or not bound to the export profile.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny regulator export planning until sealed archive integrity is verified

errors.description: The WORM immutable storage manifest is missing, malformed, or not bound to the export profile.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny regulator export planning until WORM storage readiness is verified

errors.description: The TSA timestamp metadata is missing, malformed, or not bound to the export profile.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny regulator export planning until TSA timestamp readiness is verified

errors.description: The policy decision metadata is missing, malformed, or outside the hash-only metadata contract.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny regulator export planning until policy decision metadata is verified

errors.description: The regulator export output path is mutable or not content-addressed local-only notation.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny regulator export planning when output paths are mutable

errors.description: The regulator export profile contains duplicate or replayed evidence references.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny regulator export planning when evidence references are duplicated

errors.description: The regulator export evidence references are reordered or outside the required append-only order.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny regulator export planning when evidence ordering is ambiguous

errors.description: The regulator export profile contains raw payload material or secret-like markers.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny regulator export planning when raw payload leakage is detected

errors.description: The regulator export diagnostics contain unsafe or unredacted material.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny regulator export planning when diagnostics are not redacted
